Our Promise

Six commitments behind
every frozen packet.

Fresh Ingredients Only

Vegetables, lentils and spices are sourced daily — nothing sits in storage waiting to be used.

Hygienic Manufacturing

Our kitchen follows strict sanitation protocols, from covered prep stations to sealed cold-chain packing.

FSSAI Compliant

Licensed and regularly audited under FSSAI (Lic. No. 21425850008086) for full food-safety compliance.

100% Vegetarian

Every product is purely vegetarian, prepared in a dedicated vegetarian-only kitchen.

Careful Quality Checks

Each batch is checked at every stage — filling, folding, frying-test and freezing — before it's approved.

Consistent Taste, Always

Standardised recipes and measured spice blends mean the same great taste in every single packet.

How It's Made

From Kitchen to Table

Every Cook Ji snack follows the same careful journey before it reaches your freezer.

Sourcing

Fresh produce & lentils procured daily

Preparation

Hand-mixed masalas, hand-folded shells

Quality Inspection

Weight, seal & taste checks per batch

Snap Freezing

Locked in freshness within hours

Packaging

Sealed airtight in hygienic packs

Delivery

Cold-chain dispatch to your store

6+ Quality checkpoints
on every batch

Our Story

A family kitchen,
grown with care.

Cook Ji Snacks began in Indore as a simple promise: to bring the taste of a well-loved family kitchen into every frozen pack, without ever cutting corners on hygiene or ingredients.

What started with a handful of hand-folded samosas has grown into a dedicated production kitchen — but the recipes, the care, and the family behind them haven't changed. We've simply added the food-safety systems, cold-chain discipline, and quality checks needed to serve that same homemade taste at scale.

Today, Cook Ji is trusted by households and retailers across the region who want snacks that taste like they were made at home — because, in spirit, they still are.

100%Vegetarian Kitchen
FSSAILicensed & Audited
IndoreProudly Made in M.P.

Questions

Frequently Asked
Questions

All Cook Ji products are frozen ready-to-fry. Fry them straight from frozen in hot oil for a few minutes until golden — no thawing required.

Keep the snacks stored properly. Our products are made fresh and only last for 12 hours.

Minimum order quantities depend on your city and delivery route. Share your requirement through the distributor form or WhatsApp us directly and our team will confirm the details.

Yes, every Cook Ji product is 100% vegetarian, prepared in a dedicated vegetarian kitchen. Products contain wheat (maida) in the outer shell — if you have specific allergen concerns, reach out and we'll share full ingredient details.

We currently supply across Indore and are expanding cold-chain delivery to nearby cities in Madhya Pradesh. Contact us to check availability in your area.
